endpoint_probe.probe_result: No common local OpenAI-compatible endpoint was reachable from the Windows workstation during this check.

evidence_boundary.claim: No OSS/HPC model-behavior evidence is claimed by this record. This is only a setup and endpoint-readiness record.

required_for_real_evidence: A reachable OpenAI-compatible endpoint exposing /v1/models and /v1/chat/completions or equivalent chat endpoint.
A real model id served by that endpoint.
Run scripts/run_nested_provider_evidence.py with --classification oss or --classification hpc and without --dry-run.
Store raw responses under ignored results/ until sanitized release review.
Publish only aggregate sanitized summary rows unless raw responses are intentionally scrubbed and approved.
non_claims: This record is not an OSS benchmark.
This record is not an HPC benchmark.
This record does not compare OSS/HPC behavior to Azure behavior.
This record does not contain raw model outputs.
This record does not satisfy provider_gate.example.yaml.
